questions.question:
Choose the figure which is different from the rest.
 (1) (2) (3) (4) (5)
questions.explanation: The pins, equal in number to the number of sides in the main figure are attached to the midpoint of a side of the main figure in case of figures (2), (3), (4) and (5). In fig. (1), these pins are attached to a vertex of the main figure.
questions.shortcut: Visual reasoning: observe the figure carefully, identify the pattern or transformation being tested
questions.trap_type: Not accounting for rotation, reflection, or perspective changes correctly
